body:
## Wave 3 — Client Intake + Presentation OS

### ما الذي تغيّر

**المحرك (intake_engine.py) — مُبني من جديد بالكامل:**
- نظام scoring من 0–100 بـ 10 عوامل موزونة
- تصنيف Tier A/B/C/D تلقائي
- كشف نقاط التسرب (Leakage Map أولية)
- توليد مسودات واتساب لـ Tier A+B
- توليد proposal stubs لـ Tier A
- تحديث CRM تلقائي بعد كل intake
- fallback-safe — يعمل بدون بيانات مسبقة

**الملفات المحدّثة:**
| الملف | ما الذي تغيّر |
|-------|--------------|
| `intake_engine.py` | محرك جديد كامل بالـ scoring والـ leakage map |
| `CLIENT_INTAKE_SYSTEM.md` | وثيقة معمارية كاملة لنظام الـ intake |
| `INTAKE_FIELDS_AR.md` | 28 حقل مع تأثير كل حقل على الـ score |
| `WHATSAPP_INTAKE_BOT_SCRIPT.md` | 10 رسائل متسلسلة + ردود على الاعتراضات |
| `DEALIX_COMPANY_PRESENTATION_AR.md` | عرض 12 شريحة كامل بالعربي |
| `scripts/dealix_intake_day.sh` | runner محسّن مع next steps |
| `.github/workflows/intake_day.yml` | syntax check + engine run + artifact |

**الملفات الجديدة:**
- `company/intake/CLIENT_INTAKE_SCORING_MODEL.md` — نموذج الـ scoring الكامل مع مثال تطبيقي
- `company/presentation/DIAGNOSTIC_SPRINT_PITCH_AR.md` — عرض مبيعات كامل للـ Sprint بالأسعار وردود الاعتراضات

### Validation

```
Python 3.11.15
bash syntax: OK
OK Template:    company/runtime/intake/2026-06-19/CLIENT_INTAKE_TEMPLATE.csv
OK Summary:     company/runtime/intake/2026-06-19/INTAKE_SUMMARY.md
OK Intakes:     1 processed — Tier A: 1
OK CRM:         company/crm/pipeline.csv
=== VALIDATION PASS ===
```

### ما لم يُفعل (مقصود)
- لا Docker، لا npm، لا إرسال تلقائي
- لا ملفات runtime مُدمجة
- لا Next.js page — يأتي في Wave 4


---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_013o5KPdEBiqfZBRLbePom3Z)_

commits.messageBody:
Wave 3 — Intake & Presentation OS. Upgrades the existing intake system
from basic Q&A to a full scoring engine with Tier A-D classification,
Leakage Map detection, WhatsApp drafts, proposal stubs, CRM update,
and comprehensive Arabic company presentation + sprint pitch deck.

Files upgraded:
- company/intake/intake_engine.py: full scoring (0-100), Tier A-D,
  leakage detection, WhatsApp draft gen, proposal stubs, CRM update
- company/intake/CLIENT_INTAKE_SYSTEM.md: full architecture doc
- company/intake/INTAKE_FIELDS_AR.md: 28-field guide with scoring impact
- company/intake/WHATSAPP_INTAKE_BOT_SCRIPT.md: full 10-message flow
  with objection handling and closing scripts
- company/presentation/DEALIX_COMPANY_PRESENTATION_AR.md: 12-slide full
  Arabic company presentation
- scripts/dealix_intake_day.sh: upgraded runner with next-steps
- .github/workflows/intake_day.yml: syntax check + engine run + artifact

Files added:
- company/intake/CLIENT_INTAKE_SCORING_MODEL.md: full scoring model doc
  with worked example and offer recommendation matrix
- company/presentation/DIAGNOSTIC_SPRINT_PITCH_AR.md: full sprint pitch
  with pricing, objection handling, and closing templates

Validation: python 3.11 OK, bash -n OK, engine ran — 1 template, Tier A

https://claude.ai/code/session_013o5KPdEBiqfZBRLbePom3Z
commits.messageHeadline: feat(wave-3): Client Intake + Presentation OS — full expansion

title: feat(wave-3): Client Intake + Presentation OS — full expansion
